name: CoroWare, Inc.
summary: CoroWare, Inc., through its subsidiary, CoroWare Technologies, Inc., delivers custom engineering services, and hardware and software products in North America and Europe. It offers research and development engineering services; business process workflow services; software architecture, design, and development services; content management services; console, PC, and online game production services; and marketing coordination and management services. The company's products include CoroBot Classic, which enable customers to deploy and develop robotic solutions, as well as assist the hardware developers with physical mounting space, ports, sensors, and communication devices; and CoroBot Spark, a mobile robotics platform that supports the development of mobile robot applications that runs on Linux and Windows 10 operating systems. CoroWare, Inc., through its subsidiary, CoroWare Robotics Solutions, Inc., also offers mobile robotics, and Internet of Things products, solutions, and services for universities, government and corporate researchers, and enterprise customers. The company was formerly known as Innova Robotics & Automation, Inc. and changed its name to CoroWare, Inc. in April 2008. CoroWare, Inc. is headquartered in Bellevue, Washington.
